title: Tony Smith (rugby league, born 1970)
description: English RL coach and former GB & England international rugby league footballer
extract: Antony Smith (born 16 July 1970), also known by the nickname "Casper", is an English former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 1980s, 1990s and 2000s, and coached in the 2000s. He played at representative level for Great Britain, England and Yorkshire, and at club level for the Castleford Tigers, Wigan Warriors and Hull FC, as a stand-off, scrum-half or hooker, and coached at club level for the Wakefield Trinity Wildcats.
